creator: joseph.scott@owp.csus.edu
text:
Add WWW to description of audio/wmcdplay

diff -urN audio/wmcdplay/pkg/DESCR.orig audio/wmcdplay/pkg/DESCR
--- audio/wmcdplay/pkg/DESCR.orig       Thu Jan 20 09:53:52 2000
+++ audio/wmcdplay/pkg/DESCR    Thu Jan 20 09:54:09 2000
@@ -3,3 +3,5 @@
 Author: Sam Hawker <shawkie@geocities.com>
 
 FreeBSD port patches contributed by Chia-Hsing Yu <davidyu@ken.csie.ntu.edu.tw>
+
+WWW: http://www.geocities.com/SiliconValley/Vista/2471/wmcdplay.html
